pro_brother.song_name: You Dont Know How It Feels

content:
You Don’t Know How It Feels by Tom Petty


[Intro]

[ch]E[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]  (x4)


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch] 
Let me run with you tonight I'll take you on a moonlight ride[/tab]
[ch]E[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]  
There's someone I used to see but she don't give a damn for me[/tab]
[ch]E[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]


[Chorus]

[tab]              [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]       
    So let me get to the point let's roll another joint[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
    Turn the radio loud I'm too alone to be proud[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
    You don't know how it feels[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch] 
    You don't know how it feels...to be me[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]  
People come people go some grow young some grow cold[/tab]
[ch]E[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]  
I woke up in between a memory and a dream[/tab]
[ch]E[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]


[Chorus]

[tab]              [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]       
    So let's  get to the point let's roll another joint[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
    Let's  head on down the road to somewhere I gotta go[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
    You don't know how it feels[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  
    you don't know how it feels...to be me[/tab]


[Bridge] (x2)
                                                 
[tab]e|-------------------------------------------||
B|-------------------------------------------||
G|-------------------------------------------||
D|--------------0-------------------0--------||
A|-----------2-----4-------------2-----4--0--||
E|---0--3\4--------------0--3\4--------------||[/tab]

[ch]E[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  (hold the A)

2nd guitar can play riff under this progression, after first E  D  A:

[tab]e|---12--------||
B|---15b(17)---||
G|-------------||
D|-------------||
A|-------------||
E|-------------||[/tab]


[Verse 3]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch] 
My old man was born to rock but he's still tryin' to beat the clock[/tab]
[ch]E[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]  
Think of me what you will I've got a little space to fill[/tab]
[ch]E[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]


[Chorus]

[tab]              [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]       
    So let's  get to the point let's roll another joint[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
    Let's  head on down the road to somewhere I gotta go[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
    You don't know how it feels[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
    You don't know how it feels[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]                  
 No you don't know how it feels...to be me[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
    You don't know how it feels[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
    You don't know how it feels[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]                  
 No you don't know how it feels...to be me[/tab]


[Outro]

[ch]E[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  (hold the A)
[ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  (repeat a bunch of times then end on [ch]E[/ch])
